source: Official company posting; verified via LinkedIn
job_description:
# Healthcare Data Associate
Company: Diverge Health
Source: Official company careers page and LinkedIn
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://divergehealth.org/careers/
LinkedIn reference: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/healthcare-data-associate-at-diverge-health-4371034946

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare data role listed under Population Health: Quality & Risk Adjustment.
- Focuses on Medicaid and Medicare populations, quality metrics, HEDIS, reporting, dashboards, data reliability, and cross-functional decision support.
- Requires 5+ years of healthcare data analyst experience and at least 2 years of SQL including complex queries and data validation.
- Strong match for payer/claims, quality reporting, SQL validation, HIPAA, and stakeholder analytics experience.
strengths: Direct healthcare analytics fit with Medicaid/Medicare, quality reporting, SQL, and data validation.
Strong overlap with Swagatika's payer data, claims/member eligibility, HIPAA awareness, reporting, and cross-functional stakeholder work.
Remote role and no-sponsorship requirement align with candidate constraints.
gaps: Posting calls out HEDIS and risk adjustment; resume supports payer quality and claims data but should not overclaim direct HEDIS ownership if not present.
Healthcare standards such as SNOMED/LOINC should be treated as exposure/gap unless supported elsewhere.
notes: Apply first. Tailor toward healthcare data quality, Medicaid/Medicare populations, SQL validation, reporting reliability, dashboards, and stakeholder-ready insights. Keep HEDIS/risk adjustment as adjacent exposure unless directly supported.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Associate | SQL Data Analyst | Data Quality Analyst

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains.
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and translating trusted healthcare data into reporting-ready insights across payer, claims, member eligibility, provider, and enterprise data domains.

replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage
replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, reporting validation, root-cause analysis, defect triage
